title: POST /reblog and /unreblog: create boost post, Announce activity
description:
POST /api/v1/statuses/:id/reblog: create a new posts row that is a boost (boost_of_id or boost_of_uri set, content='', content_html=''). Enqueue Announce{object: original_ap_uri}. Return a Status object where outer wrapper has empty content and reblog field is the full original Status. POST /api/v1/statuses/:id/unreblog: delete the boost post, enqueue Undo{Announce}.

Agent workflow: Spawn a research subagent to fetch a boost Status from mastodon.social and document the exact shape (the outer wrapper and the nested reblog object).

Test discipline:
- Boost local post → new posts row created with boost_of_id set
- Returned Status: outer content is '', reblog is full nested Status
- Boost already-boosted post → 422 or idempotent return of existing boost
- Unboost → boost post deleted, Undo Announce enqueued
- Announce activity JSON shape validated against mastodon.social oracle

Defensive programming:
- A user cannot boost their own direct-visibility post (visibility check)
- Boost wrapper ap_id is a new unique URI, not the original's URI
acceptance_criteria: Boost creates wrapper post; returned Status has empty content with nested reblog; Announce enqueued; unboost removes wrapper and enqueues Undo; own direct post not boostable
